text: Expect road closures for several hours for the Major Crash Investigation.
Incident: Hit and Run crash investigation at 23rd and L Street, NW. One adult female pedestrian critically injured. Driver fled the scene. Lookout for a white Jeep with MD tags.
Taylor Simmons has been located. Thank you for your help.

On Thursday 4/16 at approximately 10:45 pm, MPD responded to the discharge of a firearm in the 1000 block of 2nd Street, SE. A single shot was fired. There were no injuries or damage to property. Members of @CapitolPolice, already in the area, assisted our response.

Incident: MPD is on scene of Anacostia Park where a young juvenile male was located in the Anacostia River. The boy was transported by @usparkpolicepio to an area hospital and sadly pronounced dead. MPD is handling the investigation into this apparent drowning.
